title: Weapon Enhancing
description: A mod providing various upgrades to weapons aiming to improve PVP
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406e57c342752e88ec7fa931f0f242deca9b061c.png)
![describe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48086d1ab77b1a6f3e137606629ae27967362595.png)
### **This Mod adds**

 

- 18 Unique Weapons (24 in total)
- A new way to craft
- A new villager type
- a new structure
- And more...
 

 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The mod adds **three tiers** of **enhancement templates**, with each tier having a **unique set** of weapons for **each material** (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
with **template fragments** found in the **refinery** structure found in taigas,

being able to craft the **tier 1 template** with **9** of them.

with the second tier being got by getting a **template cage**, putting the template inside
and **covering the cage with powdered snow** from **all sides** you get it.

with the **third tier** being normally crafted with thier weapons having their **own exclusive enchantments** :

</details>



![t1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a574780b65c9b12a26dcb5708d648f89e36a8821.png)
### **Tier 1's**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Dagger** (Has No Invincibility Frames)
- **sabre**
- **glaive**
- **hatchet**
- **long axe**
- **ono**

</details>



![t2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfe9cc6d953d46bd41bb7763aee6fa5bf575c4e4.png)  
### **Tier 2's**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Broadsword** (Has Natural Knockback)
- **short sword**
- **longsword**
- **broad axe**
- **archer's axe**
- **war axe**

</details>



![t3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edcf4e3e0aa9d8f88250efb467f4de9b2644e58c.png)
### **Tier 3's**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Falcion** (Vampirism Enchant that heals on hit)
- **Zweihander** (Frezzing Enchant that has powder snow effect on hit)
- **Rapier** (Pierce enchant that dashes on right click)
- **Gilded cleaver** (Cleave enchant that hits nearby enemies)
- **Tomahawk** (Hold Right click to throw and Quick throw and Triple Bladed Enchants)
- **Poleaxe** (Venom Touch Enchant that poisons on hit)

</details>
